title: OnlyCraftOnce
description: Do you only want two maces on the server? Are you annoyed by the idea of unlimited items? Then this mod is for you!
body:
# Only craft once
Do you only want one mace on the server? Are you annoyed by the idea of unlimited items? Then this mod is for you!

You can set the maximum amount of times an item can be crafted. After it's been crafted that many times, any recipes that make that item won't work.

### Features:
- Prevent all recipes for an item (including smelting and modded).
- Count whenever a player increases the times crafted statistic.
- Times crafted stored per-world.
- Mod configuration is global (not per-world).
- Very easy to understand config.
- For Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge.
- No library mods needed.

![crafting a mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/049c4c5fb82cd1c84ec1bdc9c4d85b38b40937b4.png)

Config documentation: https://github.com/tommyrobot666/only_craft_once/wiki
